Off Calendar Aug-30-2023 Continued To Sep-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance: Paul Melbostad appeared via zoom for Rex Hale (petitioner).

Mr. Melbostad stated that he filed the final distribution but it was rejected by e-filing for submitting the filing with a status date, he will refile without the date. Status on close of estate is continued to September 27, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-02-2023 Continued To Aug-30-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-10-2023 Continued To Aug-02-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-27-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated July 10, 2007 is admitted to probate. Rex J. Hale is appointed as the Executor Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed. Status on close of estate is set for July 10, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Isodoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Lydia Villareal. Probate Examiner: Brandon Slykhous. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: S. Phan. Not reported.
